hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in */ws63-pac/src/lib.rs) echo 'BLOCKED: lib.rs is svd2rust-generated — edit ws63-svd/WS63.svd and regenerate (ROADMAP phase 2), do not hand-edit.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$c" in *hisiflash*write-program*|*burntool*) case "$c" in *HIL_CONFIRM=1*) : ;; *) echo 'BLOCKED: destructive hardware flash. Prepend HIL_CONFIRM=1 to confirm, or run the hil-smoke skill (user-invoked).' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac ;; esac
